description: isPreviousAuditAvailable=true, isAuditTypeAnnexure=true, isFinalised=true. All 6 bullets expected with balanced realistic metrics.
isPreviousAuditAvailable=true, isAuditTypeAnnexure=true, isFinalised=true. All 6 bullets expected with balanced realistic metrics.
isPreviousAuditAvailable=false. Paragraph 2 must be absent, and previousAuditRecurringPct/recurringDelta must be omitted from Paragraph 3.
isAuditTypeAnnexure=false. Paragraph 4 must be absent regardless of other values.
isPreviousAuditAvailable=false and isAuditTypeAnnexure=false. Exactly 4 bullets expected (P1, P3, P5, P6).
isFinalised=false with completionDelayDays empty string. Paragraph 5 must not narrate completion delay.
totalIssues=0 across issue sections, closure and recurring rates as 0 or empty per schema. Tests explicit zero reporting and Not Available handling.
High recurringPct (>25), recurringHighAndZtIssues > 0, compliance decline, and positive deltaHighAndZtIssues. Tests risk-heavy narration and conditional bolding.
Negative deltaTotalIssues and deltaHighAndZtIssues with positive deltaCompliancePct. Tests correct directionality and sign-safe delta language.
Use empty-string allowed fields (e.g., averageIssueClosureTimeDays, issuePercentage, complianceScore, auditRating) to validate Missing Field Policy and no hallucination.
